meaning: fracture [医]科勒斯氏骨折(桡骨下端骨折)
examples: Colles' fracture: Dorsal splint or complete cast during the first 10 days?
Objective: Discussing a method which can reduce the complications after Colles Fracture Plaster outer-fixation.
Methods: Fixing treating the Colles Fracture with wrapping sides plaster, Function exercises at the early period after operation.
